scripts.dev:local: concurrently -n web,api -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w @athens-fm/web" "npm run dev -w @athens-fm/api"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @athens-fm/web && npm run build -w @athens-fm/api
scripts.test: npm run test -w @athens-fm/web -- --passWithNoTests && npm run test -w @athens-fm/api -- --passWithNoTests
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @athens-fm/web && npm run lint -w @athens-fm/api
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @athens-fm/web && npm run typecheck -w @athens-fm/api
